title: memecylon depressum
intro: Memecylon depressum, also known as the small-fruited Memecylon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant is traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Memecylon depressum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and astringent. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves and stems in water, which can then be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
